arts.ttl: Dembele hat-trick sends PSG into play-offs
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele's hat-trick helps Paris St-Germain into the Champions League play-offs in a 4-1 win over Stuttgart, eliminating the German side in the process on matchday eight of the group phase at the MHP Arena.

arts.ttl: Dembélé’s hat-trick sends PSG soaring into playoffs and Stuttgart crashing out
arts.athr: Nick Ames at the MHP Arena
arts.sum: If Stuttgart would have settled for a biscotto, they ended up with a soggy mush. A point apiece would have sent both them and Paris Saint-Germain through but this was nothing like the kind of measured, agreeable affair that would have satisfied everyone. PSG did not so much reach for the safety net of a playoff spot as fling themselves into it gleefully, producing their second free-flowing, fleet-footed display in a week to make nonsense of suggestions they would be the biggest gun to fall at this hurdle. arts.ttl: Donnarumma pulls off game-defining save as PSG progresses to Champions League playoffs
arts.sum: Gianluigi Donnarumma produced a save that kept the momentum going for his team as PSG progressed to the Champions League playoffs. Barcola had scored PSG’s opening goal in the sixth minute.
German Police arrest 59 French 'hooligans' before Champions League match between Stuttgart and Paris St-Germain.

arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Stuttgart 1-4 PSG: Dembélé hat-trick sends Parisians through
arts.sum: After a stirring second-half comeback in their previous European outing, Paris Saint-Gerrmain could only have crashed out of the Champions League with a catastrophically unlikely set of final-matchday results. Luis…

arts.ttl: Dembele nets hattrick as Stuttgart bow out of Champions League
arts.sum: VfB Stuttgart's Champions League journey came to an abrupt end after being beaten comfortably by Paris Saint Germain. A fantastic Ousmane Dembele hattrick grabbed the headlines in an eventual 4-1 win for the Parisians on their travels.

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé completes second career hat trick at right time for PSG
arts.sum: Dembélé scored three goals in succession after Bradley Barcola gave PSG an early lead in the sixth minute. The France forward achieved the feat in the 54th minute as PSG built a 4-0 lead at Stuttgart in their Champions League game.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Alerted as £85M-Rated PSG, West Ham Target Nears Verbal Agreement with Al-Nassr
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly interested in Aston Villa forward Jhon Durán as they look to add a promising long-term option to their attack. Journalist Ben Jacobs highlighted PSG’s interest in the Colombian striker, but also pointed to a key hurdle: Aston Villa’s £80 million asking price.
